case_title: WILSON, MATTHEW H. VS KOSTELNI, JAMES H.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2007 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-07 BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK-F RAYRAY, NOTHING ON RECORD: PARTIES PRESENT IN COURT, PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETURNED; DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, MATTHEW H. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KOSTELNI, JAMES H. THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH MALICIOUS INTENT WITH REGARD TO INSTIGATING PLAINTIFF'S ARREST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY WILSON, MATTHEW H. AS TO DEFENDANT KOSTELNI, JAMES H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KOSTELNI, JAMES H.
